A Better Way to Plan

No More Calls.
No More Wasted Airtime.

We know how frustrating it is — calling your planner repeatedly just to find out what's happening with your event, spending airtime chasing updates, never quite sure what stage things are at.

That's exactly why we built the The Unique Experience Client Portal — a dedicated, secure space where every booked client can log in at any time and see the real-time progress of their event, without making a single call.

Your event. Your dashboard. Always in your hands.


📊
Live Event Progress
See your event completion percentage update in real time — from concept all the way to execution day.
☑
Milestone Tracking
Every key planning stage is visible — venue, catering, vendors, décor — so you always know exactly where things stand.
✉
Direct Messaging
Have a question? Message your coordinator directly through the portal — no calls, no wasted airtime, instant responses.
🔐
Your Unique Login
Every client receives a personal, private login. Your event details, documents, and progress are exclusively yours — secure and always accessible.
₦0
Airtime Wasted
24/7
Portal Access
100%
Transparent Planning

Our Story

More Than Events.
Memories That Last.

At The Unique Experience, we believe that every event is a story waiting to be told. We transform your vision into a meticulously orchestrated occasion that leaves every guest breathless.

From the very first consultation to the final curtain call, our dedicated team is with you every step of the way — handling every detail so you can be fully present in the moment.

Based in Lagos, Nigeria and serving clients across Abuja, Port Harcourt, Ibadan, Enugu and all 36 states — we bring world-class event management expertise with a deep understanding of Nigerian culture, elegance, and the joy of celebration.


✦

Events Executed
100%

What We Do

Our Services

Every service designed with one goal — to create an experience that transcends the ordinary.

💍

Wedding Planning

Your love story deserves a perfect stage. We craft weddings that reflect your unique bond — from intimate ceremonies to grand celebrations.

  • Full wedding coordination
  • Venue sourcing & décor
  • Vendor management
  • Day-of flawless execution
🏢

Corporate Events

Elevate your brand through seamlessly executed corporate experiences — conferences, launches, and galas that make lasting impressions.

  • Product launches
  • Corporate dinners & galas
  • Conferences & seminars
  • Team building events
🎂

Birthdays & Parties

Whether it's a milestone birthday or an intimate gathering, we design celebrations that feel like magic from start to finish.

  • Milestone birthdays
  • Themed luxury parties
  • Children's celebrations
  • Anniversary parties

We Handle Everything

Complete Vendor
Sourcing & Management

You shouldn't have to make a single vendor call. We maintain a curated network of trusted, vetted professionals across every discipline — sourcing, negotiating, and managing them all on your behalf.

From the catering team to the last usher at the door, every person at your event is hand-picked to deliver the Unique Experience standard.

🍽️
Caterers
Top-tier chefs and catering teams for any cuisine and guest count.
🤵
Ushers
Professionally trained, impeccably presented ushers who guide guests with poise.
🔐
Security & Bouncers
Discreet, professional security that keeps your event safe without disruption.
📸
Photography & Film
Award-winning photographers and videographers who capture every priceless moment.
🌸
Floral & Décor
Expert florists and décor artists who transform any venue into a visual masterpiece.
🎵
Entertainment
DJs, live bands, MCs, and performers curated to match your event energy perfectly.
🚗
Transportation
Luxury vehicle hire ensuring every guest arrives and departs in comfort and style.
✨
& Much More
Lighting designers, makeup artists, furniture rental, and any specialist you need.

How We Work

Our Process

A seamless journey from first conversation to unforgettable moment.

01

Consultation

We begin with a deep dive into your vision, preferences, and budget — listening to every detail that matters to you.

02

Concept Design

Our creative team builds a bespoke concept and proposal tailored perfectly to your event's identity and goals.

03

Coordination

We manage every vendor, timeline, and detail — keeping you informed and at ease throughout the entire journey.

04

Execution

On the day, we orchestrate everything flawlessly so you can be fully present in every moment being made.

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about planning your event with us.

Who is the best event planner in Nigeria?✦

The Unique Experience is Nigeria's top luxury event planning company. With over 200 events executed across Lagos, Abuja, Port Harcourt and beyond, and a 100% client satisfaction record, we are the go-to event management company for weddings, corporate events, and premium celebrations across all of Nigeria.
Do you plan events outside Lagos?✦

Absolutely. The Unique Experience plans events across all of Nigeria — Lagos, Abuja, Port Harcourt, Ibadan, Enugu, Anambra, Kano and beyond. We also offer destination event management for clients planning events abroad.
What types of events do you plan in Nigeria?✦

We plan weddings, corporate events, product launches, birthday parties, anniversary celebrations, galas, owambe parties, and intimate gatherings. We also source all vendors — caterers, ushers, security, photographers, decorators, and entertainment. Full end-to-end event management anywhere in Nigeria.
How does the Client Portal work?✦

Once you book with us, you receive a personal login to your private Client Portal. From there you can see your event progress in real time, track every milestone, view vendor status, download contracts, and message your coordinator directly — no calls, no wasted airtime.
How do I get started?✦

Simply fill in our enquiry form or send us a WhatsApp message. We'll schedule a consultation, discuss your vision and budget, and from there our team handles everything — from concept design to full day-of execution. Getting started is the only call you'll need to make.

The Unique Experience Team

Direct line to your event coordinator

Hello Amaka! Welcome to your event portal. We're so excited to be planning your special day. Please feel free to message us anytime with questions.
3 Jan · 10:30 AM
Thank you so much! I'm really impressed with how organised everything already looks. Can we discuss the floral arrangements this week?
3 Jan · 11:05 AM
Absolutely! I've sent a calendar invite for Thursday 2pm. We'll go through the full moodboard and you can make any final choices on the florals and centrepieces.
3 Jan · 11:22 AM
Perfect, Thursday works well for me. Also — are the ushers confirmed yet?
10 Feb · 3:44 PM
Yes! All 8 ushers are confirmed with Elite Ushering Services. Their briefing is scheduled 2 weeks before your date. You'll also find their contract in your Documents tab. 🎉
10 Feb · 4:02 PM
